home.title: DEINDEX.ME — Delete Your Digital Presence
home.description: Free, open-source platform to discover and delete your digital footprint. GDPR & CCPA. No accounts. No stored data. One session. Total erasure.

detonate.title: DEINDEX.ME — Detonate
detonate.description: Your digital presence ends here. Review discovered services and trigger mass deletion.

database.description: Browse the open directory of services tracked by DEINDEX.ME. See deletion difficulty, methods, and expected response times for social media, data brokers, and more.

manifesto.line2: Every click, every scroll, every pause — catalogued.
manifesto.line3: Your face is in databases you’ve never heard of.
manifesto.line4: Your phone number is for sale. Right now.
manifesto.line5: Data brokers know your home address, your salary, your habits.
manifesto.line8: But you have something they don’t expect.
manifesto.line11: The law says they must delete you.
manifesto.line12: They’re counting on you never asking.

form.consent: We use this to find your digital footprint. When we’re done, we delete everything — including this. By continuing you agree to our <privacy>privacy policy</privacy> and <terms>terms</terms>.

about.title: The Cause
about.subtitle: Why this exists
about.philosophy1: You did not consent to this. Nobody sat you down and asked if it was acceptable for 4,000 companies to build a profile on you. Nobody asked permission before your phone number was sold to data brokers, your browsing history fed to ad networks, or your face indexed by surveillance systems you never knew existed.
about.philosophy2: The system was designed to make opting out impossible. Every service buries its deletion page. Every broker requires a different form. The friction is the feature. They are counting on you giving up.
about.philosophy3: DEINDEX.ME is the eject button they never wanted you to have.
about.philosophy4: One session. Enter your email. We discover your footprint. You choose what to destroy. We fire the deletion requests. You get a report. We forget you ever existed. No accounts. No stored data. The platform eats itself after serving you.
about.freeForeverDescription: Privacy is a right, not a product. This tool will never have a paywall, a premium tier, or a “pro” plan.
about.openSourceDescription: Every line of code is public. Audit it. Fork it. Improve it. Trust is earned by transparency, not promises.
about.statelessDescription: No database. No user sessions. No cookies. Your data exists in your browser for the duration of one session, then it is gone. We cannot be breached because we hold nothing.
about.noSurveillanceDescription: No tracking pixels. No analytics that identify individuals. No ads. We use cookieless, privacy-respecting analytics to count page views. That is it.
about.whoBuilt1: DEINDEX.ME is built and maintained by people who believe the internet needs an undo button. We are developers, privacy researchers, and digital rights advocates who got tired of watching data brokers profit from information people never agreed to share.
about.whoBuilt2: The project is community-driven and funded entirely by donations. No investors. No board. No one to answer to except the people we serve.
about.githubRepoDescription: View the source, report issues, contribute to the service database
about.supportCauseDescription: Help fund hosting, API costs, and development
about.pressDescription: For press inquiries, interviews, or media requests:

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.shortVersionText: We collect your email and phone number for one session. We use them to find your accounts and send deletion requests. Then we delete everything. We have no database. There is nothing to breach.
privacy.section1Intro: When you use DEINDEX.ME, you voluntarily provide:
privacy.section1EmailItem: <highlight>Email address</highlight> — used to discover accounts, send deletion requests, and deliver your detonation report
privacy.section1PhoneItem: <highlight>Phone number</highlight> (optional) — used to expand account discovery and include in deletion requests where relevant
privacy.section1Closing: That is everything. We do not collect names, addresses, payment details, IP addresses for identification, or any other personal information.
privacy.section2DiscoveryItem: <highlight>Account discovery</highlight> — we query the Have I Been Pwned API and our curated service database to identify where your data exists
privacy.section2DeletionItem: <highlight>Deletion requests</highlight> — we generate and send GDPR/CCPA deletion requests to services you select
privacy.section2ReportItem: <highlight>Detonation report</highlight> — we generate a PDF summarizing all actions taken and email it to you
privacy.section3Body: For the duration of a single session. All your data exists in your browser and in a short-lived encrypted token (JWT) that expires after one hour. Once your detonation report is emailed, everything is purged immediately. There is no database. There is no “30-day retention.” There is no backup. It is gone.
privacy.section4Body1: Your email and phone number are included in the deletion requests sent to third-party services. This is the entire point — for a company to delete your data, they need to know which data is yours.
privacy.section4Body2: We do not sell, rent, or share your information with anyone for any other purpose. Ever.
privacy.section5Body: None. Zero. We do not use cookies. We do not use local storage for tracking. We do not use fingerprinting.
privacy.section6Body: We use privacy-respecting, cookieless analytics (Plausible or Umami) to understand how people use the site — page views, referral sources, country-level geography. These tools do not track individuals, do not use cookies, and comply with GDPR without requiring consent. We cannot identify you from our analytics data.
privacy.section7Intro: DEINDEX.ME uses the following third-party services:
privacy.section7ResendItem: <highlight>Resend</highlight> — email delivery (verification emails, deletion requests, reports)
privacy.section7StripeItem: <highlight>Stripe</highlight> — donation processing (we never see or store your payment information)
privacy.section7CloudflareItem: <highlight>Cloudflare</highlight> — DNS, CDN, and Turnstile bot prevention
privacy.section7HibpItem: <highlight>Have I Been Pwned</highlight> — breach database for account discovery
privacy.section8Body1: Under GDPR (EU/EEA) and CCPA (California), you have the right to access, correct, and delete your personal data. Since we delete everything immediately after your session ends, there is nothing to request deletion of after the fact.
privacy.section8Body2: If you have questions about data processing during an active session, contact us at the address below.
privacy.section10Body: If we update this policy, we will update this page and the “Last updated” date above. We cannot notify you by email because we do not have your email. The spirit of this policy will not change: we collect the minimum, we keep nothing, and we never sell your data.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.shortVersionText: DEINDEX.ME sends deletion requests on your behalf. We cannot guarantee companies will comply. We do not store your data. The service is free and open source.
terms.section1Body: DEINDEX.ME is a free platform that discovers digital accounts associated with your email address and phone number, then generates and sends deletion requests to those services on your behalf. We use GDPR Article 17 (Right to Erasure) and CCPA Section 1798.105 (Right to Delete) as the legal basis for these requests.
terms.section2Body: By using DEINDEX.ME, you authorize us to: (a) scan for accounts associated with your email address and phone number using the Have I Been Pwned API and our curated service database, (b) send deletion requests to the services you select, using your email address as the data subject identifier, and (c) email you a PDF report summarizing the actions taken. You confirm that the email address and phone number you provide are your own.
terms.section3Intro: We send deletion requests. We cannot guarantee that companies will comply. Compliance depends on:
terms.section3Item1: The applicable law in your jurisdiction and theirs
terms.section3Item2: Whether the company falls within the scope of GDPR or CCPA
terms.section3Item3: Whether a legal exception applies (legal holds, fraud prevention, etc.)
terms.section3Item4: The company's own data deletion policies and response times
terms.section3Closing: GDPR requires a response within 30 days. CCPA requires a response within 45 days. If a company does not respond, your detonation report includes guidance on filing complaints with the relevant supervisory authority.
terms.section4Body: Some services require actions that only you can take — identity verification, multi-step account deletion, or sending emails from your own email client. Your detonation report will clearly identify these services and provide step-by-step instructions. You are responsible for completing these actions yourself.
terms.section5Body: DEINDEX.ME does not create user accounts. We do not store your email, phone number, scan results, or any other personal data after your session ends. All data is held temporarily in your browser and in a short-lived encrypted token. Once your report is emailed, everything is deleted. See our <privacyLink>Privacy Policy</privacyLink> for details.
terms.section6Body: You must be at least 16 years old to use DEINDEX.ME if you are in the EU/EEA (GDPR minimum), or at least 13 years old if you are in the United States (CCPA/COPPA). If you are under the applicable minimum age, do not use this service.
terms.section7Body: DEINDEX.ME is open source software licensed under the <mitLink>MIT License</mitLink>. The source code is publicly available for review, audit, and contribution.
terms.section8Body: DEINDEX.ME is provided “as is” without warranty of any kind. To the maximum extent permitted by law, we are not liable for any damages arising from the use of this service, including but not limited to: incomplete data deletion by third parties, service downtime, errors in account discovery, or any actions taken by third-party services in response to deletion requests. This is a free service operated in good faith.
terms.section9Body: We may update these terms. Changes will be reflected on this page with an updated date. Continued use of the service after changes constitutes acceptance of the revised terms.

blog.title: The Movement
blog.subtitle: Essays on surveillance, privacy, and digital resistance
blog.comingSoonDescription: Long-form essays on data brokers, surveillance capitalism, and the right to disappear. Written to arm you with knowledge, not sell you a product.
blog.noSpam: No spam. No tracking. Just a heads-up when we publish.
blog.submittedTitle: Noted. We will reach out when the first essay drops.
blog.submittedNote: We will not store this email beyond the mailing list. No spam. No tracking.

donate.title: Support the Cause
donate.subtitle: Free forever. Open source. Funded by people who give a damn.
donate.cancelled: Donation cancelled. No charge was made.
donate.budgetHostingDescription: Servers, domains, email delivery, API costs.
donate.budgetHibpDescription: The breach database that powers account discovery.
donate.budgetDevDescription: Expanding the service database. Building new scanners. Staying ahead of dark patterns.
donate.budgetLegalDescription: Template review, compliance research, fighting back when companies ignore deletion requests.
donate.finePrint: Processed securely by Stripe. We never see or store your payment details.
donate.finePrintLicense: DEINDEX.ME is open source under MIT license.
donate.philosophy: “We will never run ads. We will never sell data. We will never put this behind a paywall. If you believe the internet should have an eject button, help us keep building one.”
donate.successMessage: Your support keeps this platform free, open source, and uncompromised.
donate.successReceipt: No receipt will be stored on our end. Stripe handles everything. We never see your payment details.
